---
title: "Umbu Mahani"
author: "Umbu Mahani"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ['css/custom_resume.css', 'css/styles.css', 'resume']
    self_contained: true
---


```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  results='asis', 
  echo = FALSE
)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)

# Set this to true to have links turned into footnotes at the end of the document
PDF_EXPORT <- FALSE

# Holds all the links that were inserted for placement at the end
links <- c()

source('parsing_functions.R')


# First let's get the data, filtering to only the items tagged as
# Resume items
position_data <- read_csv('positions.csv') %>% 
  filter(in_resume) %>% 
  mutate(
    # Build some custom sections by collapsing others
    section = case_when(
      section %in% c('research_positions', 'industry_positions') ~ 'positions', 
      section %in% c('data_science_writings', 'by_me_press') ~ 'writings',
      TRUE ~ section
    )
  ) 

```


Aside
================================================================================


![logo](beta_dist.png){width=100%}

Contact {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------



- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> [umahani@asu.edu](mailto:umahani@asu.edu)
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/umahani-art](https://github.com/umahani-art)
- <i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> [linkedin.com/in/umbu-domu-mahani-5788863aa](https://www.linkedin.com/in/umbu-domu-mahani-5788863aa/)
- <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> +1 (480) 942-9661



Language Skills {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


```{r}
skills <- tribble(
  ~skill,              ~level,
  "R",                 4.5,
  "Python",            4,
  "SQL",               4,
  "Data Analysis",     4,
  "Policy Analysis",   4,
  "Business Analytics",3.5
)

build_skill_bars(skills)
```



Projects {#open-source}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Selected work available at [github.com/umahani-art](https://github.com/umahani-art)

- Policy Data Dashboard: Built interactive dashboards using R and Shiny for public policy analysis.
- Business Analytics System (PORSI): Developed a simple data tracking system for sales and inventory optimization.
- Academic Data Projects: Statistical modeling and visualization projects using R and Python.


More info {#more-info}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

See GitHub profile for additional projects and materials.


Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Made w/ [**pagedown**](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown). 

Source code: [github.com/umahani-art/cv](https://github.com/umahani-art/cv)

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.




Main
================================================================================

Umbu Domu Mahani {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
intro_text <- paste(
  "Founder of **PORSI** (F&B startup in Cipete, South Jakarta) with a background in **Public Policy** and a strong interest in **data analysis** for governance and business decision-making.",
  "",
  "I enjoy turning messy information into clear insights through analysis, visualization, and practical storytelling."
)

cat(sanitize_links(intro_text))
```



Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
position_data %>% print_section('education')
```



Selected Positions {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
position_data %>% print_section('positions')
```
